notes: 15-step r3 tour for Changing the Display Language. Liam voice throughout. Steps 1-4 on dashboard; step 5 in editor slide picker; steps 6-12 in editor settings; steps 13-15 in Preview mode (audience view). r3 fixes: (1) added 3 bridge steps (s06/s08/s10) to fill silent gaps; (2) added close-settings + preview steps (s12/s13/s14) to show audience view. Supersedes UxpEHzZvCzQ.

steps.display_text: AhaSlides has two language settings — one for the presenter, one for the audience.
steps.tts_text: AhaSlides has two language settings — one for the presenter, one for the audience.

steps.display_text: Click the globe icon to change the presenter interface language.
steps.tts_text: Click the globe icon to change the presenter interface language.

steps.display_text: Pick from 27 interface languages — the app switches instantly.
steps.tts_text: Pick from 27 interface languages — the app switches instantly.

steps.display_text: The audience language is in presentation Settings. Click New presentation.
steps.tts_text: The audience language is in presentation Settings. Click New presentation.

steps.display_text: Click Poll to add a slide — then we'll open Settings.
steps.tts_text: Click Poll to add a slide — then we'll open Settings.

steps.display_text: The Poll slide is in your deck. Now let's open Settings to set the audience display language.
steps.tts_text: The Poll slide is in your deck. Now let's open Settings to set the audience display language.

steps.display_text: Click the Settings icon on the right panel.
steps.tts_text: Click the Settings icon on the right panel.

steps.display_text: The Settings panel is opening — you'll see options for your entire presentation.
steps.tts_text: The Settings panel is opening — you'll see options for your entire presentation.

steps.display_text: Navigating to the Presentation language tab — here you'll find the dropdown for your audience's language.
steps.tts_text: Navigating to the Presentation language tab — here you'll find the dropdown for your audience's language.

steps.display_text: Pick from 32 languages — your audience sees the change immediately.
steps.tts_text: Pick from 32 languages — your audience sees the change immediately.

steps.display_text: The language is saved automatically. Let's close Settings.
steps.tts_text: The language is saved automatically. Let's close Settings.

steps.display_text: Click Preview to see exactly what your audience will see when you go live — including the language you just set.
steps.tts_text: Click Preview to see exactly what your audience will see when you go live — including the language you just set.

steps.display_text: Your audience sees AhaSlides in their chosen language — questions, options, and the join screen all in their language.
steps.tts_text: Your audience sees AhaSlides in their chosen language — questions, options, and the join screen all in their language.

steps.display_text: Language is saved automatically. Click Present to go live.
steps.tts_text: Language is saved automatically. Click Present to go live.
